failures.description: The agent fabricated the count as 20 and added an unsupported record id despite the tool result clearly reporting 13 available Mechanical Keyboard items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the number of available Mechanical Keyboard options. The plan and tool invocation were correct, and the tool returned count=13 at index 3. At index 4, the Executor produced an answer saying there are 20 options and referenced record 0000000000, neither of which is grounded in the tool output or prior context. This invented/altered value directly caused the wrong final answer. The later Evaluator did not correct the answer, so the failure was not resolved.
